milestoneTitle: Phase M9.7 — Tools redesign + mastered bucket. A new near-white-glass "Your stack" strip now sits above the Tools catalog, listing mastered tools first and the Dashboard's seed in-use tools after. Each strip entry opens the tool modal on tap. The modal itself gains a Mark mastered toggle next to Save so the user can populate the strip; flipping it re-renders the catalog so the ●ᴹ mastery badge on each card's title line reflects the new state instantly. The modality filter switched from a <select> to a .filter-chip row (Label (N) counts preserved) matching the Learn idiom — the original .learn-filter-chip class was generalized to .filter-chip and scoped per parent so the two surfaces' handlers don't cross-fire.
